candidates.title: Raise SMART_RUNNER_TRIM_REASSESS round-trip threshold for rank >= 95 runners
candidates.rationale: Two-month pattern: high-rank runners cut early by round-trip-failure guard. Not strong enough to justify unilateral change; revisit at 3+ months.

candidates.title: Block entries on earnings-cluster anchor day +/- 1 for participating tickers only
candidates.rationale: Phase C's broad 'any cluster day' rule would kill the Phase C CDNS Jul 28 +5.61 % big winner. Aug shows PRE_EARNINGS_FORCE_EXIT already handles direct participants. T3 should target late-cluster entries only; definition TBD with Sep + Oct data.

candidates.title: Joint relaxation of tt_pullback_not_deep_enough + tt_bias_not_aligned for index ETFs
candidates.rationale: Aug confirms two-gate binding constraint. Phase C T6 single-gate relaxation was symptomatic. Next step is a compare-block-chains.js simulation that relaxes BOTH gates for {SPY,QQQ,IWM,XLY} and counts redistribution.

candidates.title: End-of-window protective trail on runners
candidates.rationale: Jul + Aug both show replay_end_close as net positive (big winners preserved, 1-2 clear losers per month). Adding a tight protective trail in final 2 sessions would convert clear losers to near-breakeven with no loss of big winners. If Sep reinforces, first DA-key experiment worth shipping.
